title: ranunculus callimorphus
intro: Ranunculus callimorphus, also known as the goldenseal or yellow root, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus callimorphus include its potential to treat digestive issues, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus callimorphus include capsules, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
